title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) to Donate One (1) Unit of Grasscutter to Samahan ng mga Magpapalay ng Bayog with Office Address at Barangay Bayog, Los Baños, Laguna Represented by Its President Mr. Gerardo M. Banasihan. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 10/20/2021)
